prompt: Edit the images to enhance the highlighted region by changing its color to a bright red for clear emphasis, add a subtle glow or shadow around the region to make it stand out from the surrounding areas.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 2, which displays a map of geographic regions. Identify the specific region located in the center-right of the main map, precisely defined by the black shape in Image 1. Change the color of this identified region to a vibrant, bright red to provide clear emphasis. Additionally, apply a subtle glow or a subtle shadow around the perimeter of this red region to make it distinctly stand out from the surrounding map areas.
objects: geographic region, vibrant bright red, in the center-right
subtle glow or shadow around the perimeter of the vibrant bright red region
inset map of Brazil in the top-left
highlighted region within the inset map
